full_text:
Pang Huan (Shiwen) 龐渙 (世文)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Pang Huan (龐渙), styledShiwen (世文). Son of Pang Degong. Pang Huan was affiliated with the Jin Dynasty.
